texto: I feel strange...I really don't know what I am. In mind I'm almost a woman, in body a young woman. I am almost a woman, but what am I now? I'm no child. I am mature. I know much; I'm somewhere in between. I'm confused--that's what I am. One day I'll long for a baby in my arms or a man's strong arms to hold me...the next, for freedom, respect.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Maya Morrow que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “I feel strange...I really don't know what I am. In mind I'm almost a woman, in body a young woman…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, adolescence, development, com foco em development e girl.
